prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次约 48757→34723→27168→22846→24091，整体呈显著前移趋势，近 4 年累计前移约 2.5 万名；2025 年基准约 24091 名，较 2024 年小幅后移约 1245 名，反映当年竞争略有回落；该校在广东省物理类计划 2021–2022 年均为 150 人，2023 年 146 人，2024 年 156 人，2025 年 151 人；2026 年计划 106 人，较 2025 年大幅缩减约 30%，属近年最大幅度缩招，将显著加剧竞争。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流综合类大学；软科主榜 2021–2022 年第 26 名，2023–2025 年第 24 名，2026 年第 25 名，排名稳居全国前 30，层次极高；2026 年声誉评价为明显负面，涉及校园安全、学校管理及录取断档信号；抖音热度总排名第 5（高热），短视频曝光量极大，报考关注度持续升温；2025 年声誉亦偏负面（招生情况持续恶化），历史投档异常信号可能对报考心理产生滞后影响；化学 A+、海洋科学 A+、生物学 A+、统计学 A+、工商管理 A、应用经济学 A、教育学 A、生态学 A、法学 A-、数学 A-、理论经济学 A-、社会学 A-、马克思主义理论 A-、化学工程与技术 A-，共 14 个 A- 及以上学科，学科实力雄厚，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程、能源动力等工科大类 2024–2026 年持续高热推荐，与厦大物理类招生专业高度匹配；本省物理类考生数 2021–2026 年分别为 33.8 万→39.9 万→41.0 万→45.1 万→44.0 万→45.6 万，2026 年较 2025 年增加约 1.6 万人（+3.6%），竞争基数扩大，波动平稳，；厦门大学位于福建省（邻省），对广东考生具有天然的地缘吸引力；该校在广东省招生占比近年约 3%–4%，2025 年广东招生 114 人（占全校 3.2%），属省外招生大省，地域偏好正面。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 24091 名、2026 年计划大幅缩招约 30%（推高位次前移）、本省物理类考生增加 3.6%（推高位次后移）、学校声誉负面与抖音高热并存（报考热度不减但存在观望情绪），预计 2026 年最低录取位次约 20084 名，区间 19584–20584 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 48757→34723→27168→22846→24091, showing a significant upward trend overall, with a cumulative advance of about 25,000 places in the past 4 years; the 2025 baseline is about 24091, a slight decline of about 1245 places compared to 2024, reflecting a slight decrease in competition that year; the university's enrollment plan in Guangdong for Physics Category was 150 in 2021–2022, 146 in 2023, 156 in 2024, and 151 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 106, a sharp reduction of about 30% compared to 2025, the largest reduction in recent years, which will significantly intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class comprehensive university; ranked 26th in the Soft Science Main Ranking in 2021–2022, 24th in 2023–2025, and 25th in 2026, consistently among the top 30 nationally, very high level; the 2026 reputation evaluation is clearly negative, involving campus safety, school management, and signals of admission gaps; Douyin popularity ranks 5th overall (high heat), with extremely high short video exposure, and application attention continues to rise; the 2025 reputation is also somewhat negative (admission situation continues to deteriorate), and historical abnormal admission signals may have a lagging effect on application psychology; Chemistry A+, Marine Science A+, Biology A+, Statistics A+, Business Administration A, Applied Economics A, Education A, Ecology A, Law A-, Mathematics A-, Theoretical Economics A-, Sociology A-, Marxist Theory A-, Chemical Engineering and Technology A-, a total of 14 A- and above disciplines, with strong disciplinary strength, which has a strong appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, Energy and Power and other engineering majors have been consistently highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, highly matching the enrollment majors of Xiamen University's Physics Category; the number of Physics Category candidates in this province from 2021 to 2026 is 338,000→399,000→410,000→451,000→440,000→456,000 respectively, with an increase of about 16,000 people (+3.6%) in 2026 compared to 2025, expanding the competition base, with stable fluctuations; Xiamen University is located in Fujian Province (neighboring province), which has a natural geographical appeal to Guangdong candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Guangdong in recent years is about 3%–4%, with 114 students enrolled in Guangdong in 2025 (accounting for 3.2% of the total), making it a major province for out-of-province enrollment, with positive regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 24091, the significant reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan by about 30% (pushing the ranking forward), the increase in Physics Category candidates in this province by 3.6% (pushing the ranking backward), and the coexistence of negative school reputation and high Douyin popularity (application enthusiasm remains but there is a wait-and-see sentiment), the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 20084, with a range of 19584–20584.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Accounting (Accounting, Finance, Auditing, including dual degree programs)
- Law (including International Rule of Law Talent Base Experimental Class)
- Statistics (including Economic Statistics, Data Science and Big Data Technology)
- Computer Science (including Computer Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence, Software Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Electronic Information (including Integrated Circuits, Microelectronics, Communication Engineering)
- Financial Engineering
- Economics (including dual degree programs)
- Energy and Power (including New Energy Science and Engineering, Energy Storage Science and Engineering)
- Mathematics (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Chemical Engineering and Materials)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Aerospace and Intelligent Manufacturing)
- Science Experimental Class (Marine and Ecological Environment)
- Science Experimental Class (Life Sciences and Medical Health).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 20084, with a range of 19584–20584. Candidates with rankings below the lower limit (19584) can focus on Tier 1 flagship majors (Accounting, Law, Statistics, Computer Science); those in the middle range should prioritize Tier 2 (Electronic Information, Financial Engineering, Economics, Mathematics) while also attempting Tier 1; candidates near the upper limit (20584) should rely on Tier 3 for safety (Engineering Experimental Class, Science Experimental Class), while also considering majors at the Malaysia campus as a more stable option.

prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学 2024 年分化观望（五院四系效应仍存）、会计/财务/审计 2024 年推荐偏热、金融/财经/经济 2024 年分化观望、新闻传播 2023 年明显劝退（张雪峰效应持续）；本省历史类考生数 2021–2026 年分别为 26.9 万→27.2 万→29.0 万→26.9 万→29.2 万→32.6 万，2026 年较 2025 年大幅增加约 3.4 万人（+11.6%），竞争基数显著扩大，2025 年大幅上升 36 分，反映试卷难度或划线调整，未纳入位次直接修正；厦门大学位于福建省（邻省），对广东考生具有天然地缘吸引力；该校在广东省历史类招生占比近年约 1%–2%，属省外重要生源地，地域偏好正面。

- 会计学（会计、财务、审计，含双学士学位项目）

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 10876→7701→4945→4367→5069, showing a significant forward shift followed by a slight correction; over the past 4 years, the cumulative forward shift is about 5800 places; the 2025 baseline is approximately 5069, a slight backward shift of about 702 places compared to 2024; the university's enrollment plan for History Category in Guangdong Province was 33 in 2021, 32 in 2022–2023, 34 in 2024, 37 in 2025; the 2026 plan is only 21, a sharp reduction of about 43% compared to 2025, the largest reduction in recent years, which will significantly increase competition intensity.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class comprehensive university; Soft Science main ranking has been stable at 24th–26th nationally in recent years, very high level; 2026 reputation evaluation is clearly negative, involving campus safety, school management, and admission cutoff signals; Douyin heat overall ranking 5th (high heat), short video exposure is extremely large, admission attention continues to heat up; 2025 reputation is also negative (admission situation continues to deteriorate), historical abnormal admission signals may have a lagging effect on application psychology; Law A-, Applied Economics A, Business Administration A, Statistics A+, Sociology A-, Education A, Marxist Theory A-, etc., highly matched with History Category admission majors (Law, Economics, Accounting, Journalism and Communication, Sociology, Humanities Experimental Class), strong academic strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law 2024 differentiation wait-and-see (Five Institutes and Four Schools effect still exists); Accounting/Finance/Audit 2024 recommended slightly hot; Finance/Banking/Economics 2024 differentiation wait-and-see; Journalism and Communication 2023 clearly discouraged (Zhang Xuefeng effect continues); Number of History Category examinees in this province from 2021 to 2026: 269,000→272,000→290,000→269,000→292,000→326,000, with 2026 increasing significantly by about 34,000 (+11.6%) compared to 2025, competition base significantly expanded; 2025 saw a large increase of 36 points, reflecting exam difficulty or score line adjustment, not directly corrected in rankings; Xiamen University is located in Fujian Province (neighboring province), naturally attractive to Guangdong examinees due to geographical proximity; the university's enrollment proportion in Guangdong for History Category is about 1%–2% in recent years, an important out-of-province source area, regional preference positive.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 5069, the 2026 plan's sharp reduction of about 43% (pushing ranking forward), the 11.6% increase in History Category examinees in this province (pushing ranking backward), and the coexistence of negative university reputation and high Douyin heat (application enthusiasm remains but with wait-and-see sentiment), the estimated 2026 minimum admission ranking is about 3954, with a range of 3454–4454.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Law (including the Experimental Class for Foreign-Related Rule of Law Talent Base)
- Accounting (Accounting, Finance, Audit, including Dual Bachelor's Degree Program)
- Economics (including Dual Bachelor's Degree Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Humanities Experimental Class (including Chinese Language and Literature, History, Philosophy, etc.)
- Journalism and Communication (including Journalism, Advertising, Communication, International Journalism and Communication)
- Sociology (including Sociology, Anthropology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- None currently
- It is recommended to consider related majors at Xiamen University Malaysia Campus (Accounting, Finance, Advertising, English, Journalism, etc.) as a safe backup, as their admission rankings are usually about 1000–2000 places after the main campus baseline ranking.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 3954, range 3454–4454. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (3454) can focus on impacting Tier 1 majors (Law, Accounting, Economics); those in the middle of the range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors (Humanities Experimental Class, Journalism and Communication, Sociology) while also attempting Tier 1; candidates near the upper limit of the range (4454) should use Malaysia Campus majors as a safe backup.
